text: Hello. Yes. Hi, good morning. This is Evelyn. So, I'm calling because they're appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Texas State Relief Program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet? I can't get Medicare Advantage. My doctor doesn't take it. Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have have a great day.
